overview.description: The Innovator Equity Dual Directional 10 Buffer ETF - October (DDTO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund aims to make money in both positive and negative markets, on a limited basis, over a one-year period. The fund uses FLEX options based on the price return of the SPDR S&P 500 ETF. DDTO was launched on Sep 30, 2025 and is issued by Innovator.
